items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include specific details or outcomes related to the scenario of 'Individual cancellation within group'. While the expected result mentions a clear, actionable failure report, there is no data or prior step evidence that confirms the behavior of the system when an individual cancels within a group booking. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive verdict regarding the validation of this scenario.
